channel.title: AINews
channel.description: Weekday recaps of top News for AI Engineers

item.title: MiniMax 2.7: GLM-5 at 1/3 cost SOTA Open Model
item.content:encoded:
Congrats MiniMax!

AI News for 3/18/2026.

AI Twitter Recap

Model Releases and Benchmarks

  • MiniMax M2.7 launched as a self-evolving agent: strong performance with 56.22% on SWE-Pro and parity with Sonnet 4.6. Distribution via Ollama and OpenRouter.
  • Xiaomi MiMo-V2-Pro is a serious Chinese reasoning model: score of 49 on Intelligence Index with favorable token efficiency.

Agent Infrastructure

  • Harness engineering is becoming the key differentiator: shift from prompting to execution environments, skills, and MCP as the real product surface (discussion).

Top Tweets (by engagement, filtered for technical relevance)

  • MiniMax M2.7 announcement: the most engaged model release of the day (tweet).
  • Cartesia Mamba-3 SSM launch: early reactions focusing on hybrid architectures (tweet).
